name_en: kelly2424 mini 21cm Evercolor/swift, strongly recommended. Young retro vibe, not only beautiful but also easy to handle in various ways (handheld, single shoulder, crossbody, backpack). The backpack strap style is super practical with ample capacity. Exquisite, elegant, and casual, each style presents a different look.
